evidence: "I don't like a lot of the new series because of the violence and the language."
"I would recommend this movie to be seen by anyone, especially families together..."
"The storyline never gets old! It's a wonderful story."
"I just love this version of Pride and Prejudice."
"I like to watch it in the evening just before I go to sleep."
"I can certainly understand why 'Andy Sipowitz' won so many Emmys for this part!"
"The acting was ok, but I did not like the story of cheating and getting away with it."
"I watched it because I am a Barbra S fan."
"I love all the characters, especially Andy Sipawitz?"
"It brought back a lot of childhood memories!"
"I really enjoyed it and give it five stars."
"This is one of the best stories ever written."

summary: The user enjoys family-friendly dramas with simple narratives and a slow pacing. They have a strong appreciation for quality production and emotional resonance, often reminiscing about childhood memories through their viewing experiences.
